name: FrankSpeech Network, Inc.
business: InCapta, Inc. is a media holding company seeking investment opportunities in radio, television, movie production, and online cloud television. As of December 31, 2017, it had no revenues, one employee, and was involved in pre-production of two full-length movies, developing a weekly half-hour television show, producing a radio talk show, and launching two cloud television networks.

exposures.sentence: The current business of the Company is a media holding company, which looks for investment opportunities in radio, television, movie production and television productions to be used on online Cloud television and radio.
